Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze an event log against a normative process model with strict rules and desiderata

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me break down the normative constraints 1 Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case 2 Credit Check before Risk Assessment 3 Risk Assessment before Loan Decision 4 Inform Applicant after Loan Decision 5 If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case 6 If Rejected NO Finalize Documentation before Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata 1 Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received 2 Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision 3 Follow up Call before Close Case recommended but not required

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Now let me analyze each case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Application Received 2024 01 10 09 00 Credit Check 2024 01 10 09 30 30 min after app within 24h Risk Assessment 2024 01 10 10 00 after credit check Loan Decision Approved 2024 01 10 11 00 after risk assessment Inform Applicant 2024 01 10 13 00 after loan decision within 48h Finalize Documentation 2024 01 10 13 30 after approval Close Case 2024 01 10 14 00 after finalize documentation

Text: Case 2 Application Received 2024 01 11 08 00 Risk Assessment 2024 01 11 08 20 BEFORE Credit Check violation Credit Check 2024 01 11 09 00 AFTER Risk Assessment violation Loan Decision Rejected 2024 01 11 09 30 Finalize Documentation 2024 01 11 10 00 AFTER Rejection violation Close Case 2024 01 11 10 30

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative violations 1 Risk Assessment occurred before Credit Check ordering violation 2 Finalize Documentation occurred after a rejection logic violation Desiderata compliance Credit Check timing NA already violated normative rules Inform Applicant timing Missing entirely Follow up Call Missing Overall Normative Desiderata

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received 2024 01 12 09 00 Credit Check 2024 01 14 10 00 more than 24h later desideratum violation Risk Assessment 2024 01 14 11 00 after credit check Loan Decision Approved 2024 01 14 12 00 after risk assessment Inform Applicant 2024 01 16 15 00 after loan decision but more than 48h later desideratum violation Finalize Documentation 2024 01 17 09 00 after approval before close Close Case 2024 01 17 10 00 after finalize documentation No Follow up Call desideratum violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now I need to provide justifications interpretations Case 2 The Risk Assessment before Credit Check could suggest that the process started incorrectly perhaps due to a system error or manual override The Finalize Documentation after rejection might be a mistake in data entry or a system bug

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 The delays in Credit Check and Inform Applicant could be due to high workload system issues or staff unavailability The missing Follow up Call might be due to oversight or resource constraints
